job_metadata.job_title: Senior AI Engineer ΓÇö Founding Team

required_skills: Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems deployed to real users
Production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure
Hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems
preferred_skills: Prior exposure to HR-tech, recruiting tech, or marketplace products
Background in distributed systems or large-scale inference optimization
Open-source contributions in the AI/ML space
responsibilities: Own the intelligence layer of Redrob's product
Ship a v2 ranking system that demonstrably improves recruiter-engagement metrics
Set up evaluation infrastructure (offline benchmarks, online A/B testing, recruiter-feedback loops)
Drive the long-term architecture of candidate-JD matching at scale
Mentor the next round of hires
Work closely with recruiter-experience PM on what to build
soft_skills: Willing to ship a working ranker in a week even if the underlying ML is "obviously suboptimal"
Comfortable with deep technical depth in modern ML systems
Tilt slightly toward shipper than toward researcher
Genuinely believe culture-fit matters more at this stage than skills-fit
Work async-first and write a lot
leadership_expectations: Mentoring the next round of hires
benefits: We can buy out up to 30 days (notice period)
technology_stack: Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems deployed to real users
Production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure
Hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems
Prior exposure to HR-tech, recruiting tech, or marketplace products
Background in distributed systems or large-scale inference optimization
Open-source contributions in the AI/ML space
